title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIT Trichy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIT Trichy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIT Trichy. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About NIT Trichy:
NIT Trichy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
